author: lOrm
content: Fixed: walk_dir bounded by MAX_WALK_DEPTH=100, uses symlink_metadata (does not follow symlinks), and a canonical-path visited HashSet breaks residual cycles. 5 forensic tests added in src/tools/file_index.rs (depth-cap, symlink loop, normal walk, symlink-to-outside-root, intra-tree file symlink). All 10 file_index tests pass. cargo clippy on file_index.rs clean. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore] added by this fix.
